pages.title: Pelian - AI Development Agency | AI Agents, Voice AI, Custom Apps
pages.description: Pelian is an AI development agency that builds AI agents, voice AI, custom applications, and workflow automation. Founded in 2023. Ships in weeks, not quarters.
pages.markdown:
Pelian

# End-to-end AIengineering &transformation.

[Our services](https://www.pelian.ai/#services) Contact us

Everyideacouldbecomeaproduct.Everyproductcoulddomorewithless.Everyweekyouwait,thegapgetswider.

## Our services

Agents that replace entire roles. Products that learn from every user. Systems that run without you.Built in weeks.

### AI on your team

Siena Sinner

Summarize this report

report-2025.pdf

AI

AI agent

Thinking

### Agent Orchestration

Autonomous agents that own entire workflows - sourcing deals, running campaigns, processing applications. Not bots. Teammates that never sleep.

### Voice Agents

AI that handles calls, books meetings, and qualifies leads without anyone picking up the phone. One client automated 60% of inbound calls.

### AI in your products

### Document Retrieval

Instant answers from every doc your company has ever created. Like a teammate with perfect memory who reads everything and forgets nothing.

### Custom Applications

AI-native web apps, mobile apps, and internal tools - designed, built, and shipped around your exact workflow and data.

### AI in your operations

HubSpot

New contact form submission

Airtable

Add data to Airtable

OpenAI

Write personalised message

### Automate Tasks

Connect HubSpot, Airtable, Slack, and your entire stack into pipelines that run 24/7. The glue work between your tools disappears.

+32%

15%

### Business Consulting

Not sure where AI fits? We audit your operations, find the highest-leverage opportunities, and build a roadmap that pays for itself.

## The difference

### We run on what we sell.

Our own team is powered by the same AI we build for clients. We ship faster because we’ve already solved the hard problems internally.

### Shipped in weeks, not quarters.

No 6-month discovery phases. You get a working system in weeks with demos along the way.

### Results, not reports.

4.2x ROAS. 72% cost reduction. 30 hours saved per week. Our work speaks in numbers.

beats.label: Pelian Overview
beats.caption: Pelian AI homepage showing services and portfolio
beats.narrationText: Pelian builds AI solutions that transform businesses. Today, we'll look at FlexPay, a phone financing platform we developed.

beats.label: Our Work Section
beats.caption: Portfolio section showing client projects
beats.narrationText: Here in our portfolio, you can see several AI solutions we've delivered for clients across different industries.

beats.label: Hover FlexPay
beats.caption: FlexPay project card highlighted on hover
beats.narrationText: This is FlexPay - a fintech platform we built to streamline phone financing with AI.

beats.label: Open FlexPay
beats.caption: Clicking on the FlexPay project
beats.narrationText: Let's take a closer look at this project.

beats.label: FlexPay Details
beats.caption: FlexPay project case study page
beats.narrationText: Here's the full case study. FlexPay is an AI-powered platform that automates phone financing decisions and customer management.

beats.label: Scroll Content
beats.caption: Scrolling through FlexPay project details
beats.narrationText: The platform uses AI agents to assess credit risk, process applications, and manage customer interactions - delivering faster approvals and better user experiences.

beats.label: Summary
beats.caption: FlexPay project showcase
beats.narrationText: FlexPay demonstrates how Pelian delivers practical AI solutions that drive real business results - in this case, transforming phone financing with intelligent automation.

narrationScript: Pelian builds AI solutions that transform businesses. Today, we'll look at FlexPay, a phone financing platform we developed.
Here in our portfolio, you can see several AI solutions we've delivered for clients across different industries.
This is FlexPay - a fintech platform we built to streamline phone financing with AI.
Let's take a closer look at this project.
Here's the full case study. FlexPay is an AI-powered platform that automates phone financing decisions and customer management.
The platform uses AI agents to assess credit risk, process applications, and manage customer interactions - delivering faster approvals and better user experiences.
FlexPay demonstrates how Pelian delivers practical AI solutions that drive real business results - in this case, transforming phone financing with intelligent automation.
